visa_types.name: SHORT STAY VISA
visa_types.overview:
(Duration of stay less than 90 days)
If you wish to visit Italy for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering these countries. 
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area.
visa_types.full_text:
## (Duration of stay less than 90 days)
If you wish to visit Italy for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to entry if you come from a country with a visa requirement for entering these countries. 
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of six months (180 days) from the entry date into the Schengen Area.

visa_types.name: LONG STAY VISA
visa_types.overview:
Applications for long-term visas and residence permits (for stays longer than 90 days) need to be submitted directly at the Embassy of the Italy Riyadh or the Consulate of Italy in Jeddah.
For more information about long term visas please visit : http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en (http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en)
visa_types.full_text:
Applications for long-term visas and residence permits (for stays longer than 90 days) need to be submitted directly at the Embassy of the Italy Riyadh or the Consulate of Italy in Jeddah.
For more information about long term visas please visit : http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en (http://vistoperitalia.esteri.it/home/en)

visa_types.name: Tourist Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Checklist Tourist Visa (Riyadh and Khabar ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5O9CGE4FJn4KwgynexIdjM/49d7e3268356863002d1d3cfb23c01ab/checklist_tourist_visa.pdf)
Checklist Tourist visa (Jeddah Only) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6RA2DRTbM9RRgZ4CsZlZKu/ab620ffd5f0154bcd1b82211b743438c/checklist-tourist-jeddah-feb-2022.pdf)
Italy consulate in Jeddah will accept job letter which are attested only by the chamber of commerce under western region ( eg. Jeddah, Makkah, Madinah, Taif, Yanbu, Qunfudah, Abha, Najran, Jizan etc.)
Italy Consulate will not accept any Application which is not belongs to Jeddah Jurisdiction (For example: Employment letter, Bank Statement and National address should belong to Jeddah Jurisdiction) 
If any Non-Saudi Applicant is married to a Saudi national it is necessary to provide Marriage certificate along with English translation.
For Russian National: Applicants have to provide the copy of Russian National Passport with the English translation attested by Russian Embassy/Consulate.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[ita > sau > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in Riyals) SAR 146 for countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union for nationals of Albania- Bosnia ed Herzegovina – north Macedonia – Georgia- Moldova
For Gambia Nationals: (483 SAR)
visa_types.processing_time:
Processing time at the Embassy may vary between 7 – 15 days depending on the nationality of the applicant
Processing Time - Jeddah
Normal processing time for applications submitted in Jeddah is 15 working days as per the Schengen regulation. However, there can be a delay in the processing time of the applications if further scrutiny of the application is required by the consulate. Please be advised, VFS will not be having any role on the guarantee of the processing time due to above mentioned subject.
Note
In case of refusal for application submitted in Jeddah, Applicant should visit VFS Jeddah center in person to sign the refusal letter.
visa_types.forms:
- Online application form click here (http://e-applicationvisa.esteri.it/)
- Download manual application form for Riyadh & Khobar only click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6PULHCyP8IE3lnwJawli0w/5875ddaf174213b455fcc9856a32700f/application-form_Inglese_2020.pdf)
- Download manual application form for Jeddah only click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7vMilIZARJFIRZS3UkExEA/7e3d4671f9c47d2429dec119f08c8b63/application-form-jeddah.pdf)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay for a short period in the Schengen area (not more than 90 days per 6 months)
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
A tourist visa allows you to stay for a short period in the Schengen area (not more than 90 days per 6 months)
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience

## Visa Fees

[ita > sau > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 1]
The Schengen visa fee amounts to 35 EUROs (equivalent in Riyals) SAR 146 for countries with a visa facilitation agreement with the European Union for nationals of Albania- Bosnia ed Herzegovina – north Macedonia – Georgia- Moldova
For Gambia Nationals: (483 SAR)

## Service Charges
Applicants shall be levied a service charge of SAR 101.83 /- per application (VAT Included)
Service Charge will have to be paid online via the secure payment gateway on this website before the appointment can be confirmed. Kindly refer to schedule an appointment page on this website for detailed information. 
All payments will be collected in local currency (Cash or Card) for Saudi Arabia.
- The applicable visa fee in local currency is as per the current exchange rate. It is subject to change without notice.
- The visa fee is non-refundable
VAS Services
	Riyadh & Al Khobar:

[ita > sau > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 2]
	NOTE:  Applicants who applying Al-Khobar will be charged 84 SAR (Including VAT) per Application for Two-way courier in order to transmit the documents to Italy Embassy in Riyadh.
	Jeddah:

[ita > sau > en > Table:Tourist Visa > Visa Fees 3]

## Documents Required
 Checklist Tourist Visa (Riyadh and Khabar ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5O9CGE4FJn4KwgynexIdjM/49d7e3268356863002d1d3cfb23c01ab/checklist_tourist_visa.pdf)
Checklist Tourist visa (Jeddah Only) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6RA2DRTbM9RRgZ4CsZlZKu/ab620ffd5f0154bcd1b82211b743438c/checklist-tourist-jeddah-feb-2022.pdf)
Italy consulate in Jeddah will accept job letter which are attested only by the chamber of commerce under western region ( eg. Jeddah, Makkah, Madinah, Taif, Yanbu, Qunfudah, Abha, Najran, Jizan etc.)
Italy Consulate will not accept any Application which is not belongs to Jeddah Jurisdiction (For example: Employment letter, Bank Statement and National address should belong to Jeddah Jurisdiction) 
If any Non-Saudi Applicant is married to a Saudi national it is necessary to provide Marriage certificate along with English translation.
For Russian National: Applicants have to provide the copy of Russian National Passport with the English translation attested by Russian Embassy/Consulate.

## Photo Specifications
Note: We regret we cannot accept photographs that do not meet these requirements
Please provide one recent photographs (not more than 6 months old) of yourself. The photographs should be in color and:
- Taken against a light background (white or off-white) so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear share quality and with the face in focus.
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print).
- Full face, non-smiling [without sunglasses, a hat/cap or other head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background].
- Please stick the Photograph on the Visa Application Form.
Note: Please follow these instructions carefully. If photographs presented do not meet these requirements your application will be considered incomplete. Photo booth meeting these requirements is available at the centre.

## Processing Time
Processing time at the Embassy may vary between 7 – 15 days depending on the nationality of the applicant
Processing Time - Jeddah
Normal processing time for applications submitted in Jeddah is 15 working days as per the Schengen regulation. However, there can be a delay in the processing time of the applications if further scrutiny of the application is required by the consulate. Please be advised, VFS will not be having any role on the guarantee of the processing time due to above mentioned subject.
Note
In case of refusal for application submitted in Jeddah, Applicant should visit VFS Jeddah center in person to sign the refusal letter.

## Download Forms
- Online application form click here (http://e-applicationvisa.esteri.it/)
- Download manual application form for Riyadh & Khobar only click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6PULHCyP8IE3lnwJawli0w/5875ddaf174213b455fcc9856a32700f/application-form_Inglese_2020.pdf)
- Download manual application form for Jeddah only click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7vMilIZARJFIRZS3UkExEA/7e3d4671f9c47d2429dec119f08c8b63/application-form-jeddah.pdf)

visa_types.name: Medical Visa
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For Medical visa please contact the Italian Embassy Riyadh or Italian consulate Jeddah for more informations.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For Medical visa please contact the Italian Embassy Riyadh or Italian consulate Jeddah for more informations.

visa_types.name: Airport Transit (A)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Airport Transit visa allows you to wait for a connecting flight in the international area of the airport. This visa does not grant access to the Schengen area.
Applicant are requested to contact the Italian consulate directly in order to apply for this visa type.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Airport Transit visa allows you to wait for a connecting flight in the international area of the airport. This visa does not grant access to the Schengen area.
Applicant are requested to contact the Italian consulate directly in order to apply for this visa type.

visa_types.name: Business Visa
visa_types.documents_required:
Checklist Business Visa (Riyadh and Khabar ) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/vXTk6VG3eFGx9iGCzEvVu/3180a0648831157ee46312ce18426783/checklist_business_visa.pdf)
Checklist Business visa (Jeddah Only) (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/76nT73217SuCcBDSoQO5Ee/2e3b4945d0d72d69999675e3af64960f/checklist-business-visa-jeddah-feb-2022.pdf)
Invitation format (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2UMUszIV0azubKTRNCk57F/afbe9168ab545203b4c1d24f4c812571/modello-di-invito-per-affari.pdf) (Al Khobar & Riyadh)
Invitation format (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/103nm7yWABcTIaB5D1emhg/f87583099881e7f769c156ed83027558/invitation-format-jeddah.pdf) (Jeddah)
Italy consulate in Jeddah will accept job letter which are attested only by the chamber of commerce under western region ( eg. Jeddah, Makkah, Madinah, Taif, Yanbu, Qunfudah, Abha, Najran, Jizan etc.)
Italy Consulate will not accept any Application which is not belongs to Jeddah Jurisdiction (For example: Employment letter, Bank Statement and National address should belong to Jeddah Jurisdiction) 
If any Non-Saudi Applicant is married to a Saudi national it is necessary to provide Marriage certificate along with English translation.
Applicant has to provide ID copy of the inviting person and Commercial Registration from Inviting company (Camerale) along with Invitation.
For Russian National: Applicants have to provide the copy of Russian National Passport with the English translation attested by Russian Embassy/Consulate.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
For people travelling for business purposes (short stay, not more than 90 days per 6 months), such as business meetings, conferences and events.
Incomplete, unclear or unsigned applications will not be accepted.
If the visit involves two or more Schengen countries, the Embassy responsible for the issuance of the visa will be:
- The Embassy of the country in which the traveler is going to stay the longest.
- If the traveler is to stay the same time in different Schengen countries, the Embassy of the country of first entry.
It is advisable to plan your travel well in advance to avoid any inconvenience
